title: Sarcanthus bifidus
taxonomy: Sarcanthus bifidus is classified as a genus and species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. The Sarcanthus bifidus is native to China and other parts of Asia, and it belongs to the subtribe Cranichideae. This classification places Sarcanthus bifidus within the orchid family, which is one of the largest and most diverse plant families in the world. Further classification of Sarcanthus bifidus includes its genus within the subfamily Orchidoideae. The classification of Sarcanthus bifidus is primarily based on its morphological characteristics, such as its leaves and flowers.
